headline: Schneider Outlines Roadmap for Vera Rubin Chip Cooling
summary: Schneider Electric, a global energy technology company, announced Monday, alongside Nvidia, a roadmap for cooling the latest generation of Nvidia chips.  With increased speed, however, comes increased power and cooling requirements.  Schneider’s “reference design” for Rubin racks makes it easier to build and operate AI data centers, key for any entity spending billions on AI infrastructure.

headline: AI Data Centers Are Running Hot. Buy This Stock, Analyst Says.
summary: Jefferies analyst Stephen Volkmann has reinstated his Buy rating on Eaton stock. His price target is $430 per share.

headline: Eaton collaborates with NVIDIA to unveil the Eaton Beam Rubin DSX platform to address the nearly $7 trillion data center buildout market from grid to chip
summary: CLEVELAND, March 16, 2026--Intelligent power management company Eaton debuted its new Eaton Beam Rubin DSX platform that supports the end-to-end infrastructure for AI factories, engineered for new levels of speed, efficiency and resilience. The Eaton grid-to-chip architecture, integrated with the NVIDIA Vera Rubin DSX AI Factory reference design and the NVIDIA Omniverse DSX blueprint designs, enables modular scalability for fast global AI factory build outs.

headline: Is Eaton Corporation plc (ETN) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is ETN a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Eaton Corporation plc on WealthWise’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on ETN. Eaton Corporation plc’s share was trading at $361.06 as of March 10th. ETN’s trailing and forward P/E were 33.86 and 26.60 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. Eaton […]
